scope.target: Align DBA1001 with the approved canonical contract and retire repository grep validation
scope.dependency_radius: Local compliance checks and generated validation artifacts
constraints: Depends on canonical standards and dependent-context synchronization
Do not encode semantic architecture rules as unscoped regex
Do not restore repository grep validation as a gate
Distinguish domain repository ports from query/read repository ports
Do not encode transaction or lifecycle intent as syntax-only diagnostics
non_goals: No product-specific namespace or folder assumptions

inputs.architecture_target: Executable validation that agrees with the approved repository contract
review_findings: Scripts check the old interface name
The forbidden pattern rejects allowed identity methods
Query repositories are included in domain repository checks
Relative base-path logic differs by script location
DBA1001 already provides bootstrap semantic validation but hard-codes the unresolved five-method policy

steps: Translate approved D1-D4 and D10 decisions into deterministic analyzer behavior
Add positive, negative, and false-positive analyzer tests
Assign non-deterministic transaction and lifecycle rules to tests or AI review
Retire source and generated repository grep scripts after replacement evidence passes
Update check orchestration, README, and validator ownership documents
validation: Query/read repositories and unrelated interfaces produce no diagnostics
check-all.sh no longer references retired repository scripts
Documentation and validator ownership mappings agree
deferred_items: Cross-assembly architecture tests not required by the approved D10 scope
